name: table-curves
description: Tables store x-y pairs and are used for load histories, property curves, boundary-condition modifiers, and exported history data.

common_patterns.name: Time-dependent load table
commands: zone face apply stress-normal -1e5 table 'load' range group 'Top'

validation_notes: Confirm table x-axis meaning before using it in a boundary modifier.
Use table list after import to catch delimiter or unit mistakes.
Prefer named tables over numeric IDs in generated scripts.
